Decision memo

We are taking Route orchestration software into Enterprise logistics. The product is Route orchestration software. The market is Enterprise logistics.

The locale is US; geographies include United States and Canada. Industries include Third-party logistics and Retail. Company size is 1000+.
Titles include Director of Transportation and VP Logistics. Functions include Supply Chain and Operations. Seniorities are VP and Director.

Keywords include last mile logistics and route optimization. Pains include high cost-to-serve and manual dispatch exceptions. Triggers include mixed fleet complexity and SLA pressure.

Campaign goal is Pipeline creation. Preferred channels include microsoft-ads, google-ads-youtube, and linkedin-ads.
